hero.title: Architectural Excellence
hero.subtitle: Beyond Boundaries
hero.description: Crafting timeless spaces that blend luxury with innovation, Alpine Architecture Studios transforms your vision into globally acclaimed reality.

about.heading: Alpine Architecture
about.description: Based in Roorkee, Uttarakhand, Alpine Architecture Studios is a premier firm dedicated to delivering the complete value chain in architecture and development. We specialize in providing top-tier URBAN PLANNING, ARCHITECTURE & INTERIOR DESIGN SERVICES to transform visions into globally acclaimed reality. From initial estimates and Vastu consultancy to the final environmental management, our approach combines innovation with timeless luxury.

services.title: Urban Planning
services.description: Comprehensive planning strategies for sustainable urban development and land utilization.

services.title: Architecture & Interior
services.description: Bespoke architectural design and luxurious interior spaces tailored to your vision.

services.title: Vastu Consultancy
services.description: Harmonizing spaces with traditional Indian principles for prosperity and well-being.

services.title: Project Management
services.description: End-to-end oversight ensuring projects are delivered on time and within budget.

pricing.section_description: Choose the perfect architectural service package tailored to your project scope and requirements.

plans.name: 15 MIN Telephonic Call
plans.description: To clear your Interior doubts. You ask any specific question to Sourabh over the call and after you book the call team will call you first to help you with time slot and process of the call.

plans.name: 1 HR Floor Plan Design
plans.description: Detailed video consultation with Ar. Mayur. In this slot, you will first connect with the support team and they will help you the process and the details.

plans.name: 1 HR Vastu Consultation
plans.description: Specialized Vastu-focused guidance from our experts. In this slot, you will first connect with the support team.
